# C2 Hub — doc index for assistants

Registry & conventions (markdown): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kela-guy/C1Flow/main/design-system.md
Live styleguide (components / props): https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/styleguide

Key anchors: design-system.md sections "Component Registry", "Design Tokens", "Conventions". Styleguide URLs use fragment IDs matching nav, e.g. #status-chip, #target-card.

<!-- GENERATED:components START -->

## Components (generated from the design-system manifest)

### Foundations

- **Design Tokens** (`@/primitives`) — The tiered token graph — brand-agnostic CORE (primitive raw values, semantic intent aliases, the 4px interactive radius) and the C2 DOMAIN threat accents. Authored in tokens/core.json + tokens/c2-domain.json (DTCG), generated into src/styles/tokens.generated.css (CSS vars) and src/primitives/tokens.generated.ts (typed). Theme by swapping CORE primitives; CORE never references domain values. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#tokens · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/tokens`
- **Conventions** (`governance/rules.json`) — The design-system governance rules as data — no raw hex, central icons only, the 4px interactive radius, RTL containers, oklch status colors, useCardSlots composition. Authored in governance/rules.json and enforced by `pnpm design:check` (drift guard + design-lint ratchet + eslint). Humans read them here; agents read the same source in public/DESIGN_CONTEXT.md. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#conventions
- **Motion** (`@/lib/springs`) — The three-spring motion system — fast/moderate/slow with one-tier-faster exits. All timing lives in @/lib/springs (framer-motion tokens) and is mirrored as --motion-* CSS vars + .overlay-motion-* helpers for Radix overlays. Slow in, faster out: every exit runs a tier quicker and drops the bounce. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#motion
- **Scrolling List** (`@/lib/scroll`) — The scrolling-list edge-cue system. useScrollEdges observes a scroller and reports which edges have more content; ScrollEdgeCue renders a surface-aware gradient + chevron at those edges; ScrollArea composes both with a restyled overlay scrollbar and a native fallback on touch. Signals overflow so a clipped list never looks finished. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#scrolling-list

### Primitives

- **Badge** (`@/shared/components/ui/badge`) — Compact label for status, counts, and metadata. Six variants on the C2 dark surface — translucent fills and layered rings, no hard borders. The single home for all status/indicator chips and dots: StatusChip, HealthStatus (StatusDot/HealthBadge), ActivityTimestampChip, and NewUpdatesPill are variants of this one Badge concept and are documented here. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#badge · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/badge`
- **Button** (`@/shared/components/ui/button`) — The one button foundation. Its buttonVariants cva owns every surface + size treatment in the C2 design — layered white opacities, oklch destructive; src/primitives/buttonTokens.ts is only an alias map onto it. ActionButton, SplitActionButton (Button + Button size=icon + DropdownMenu), and CopyButton (ghost icon Button) are compositions that render this foundation (documented here), not separate designs; CameraToggleButton lives on the Toggle primitive. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#button · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/button`
- **Toggle** (`@/shared/components/ui/toggle`) — Two-state pressed/unpressed button built on Radix Toggle — real aria-pressed + data-state=on semantics. The domain CameraToggleButton is a composition on this primitive (documented here), wearing the button family's fill tokens. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#toggle · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/toggle`
- **Accordion** (`@/shared/components/ui/accordion`) — A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections, built on Radix. Each item animates its height open and closed; type single/multiple controls how many can be open. The card-internal AccordionSection (the TargetCard section grammar composed by CardDetails, CardIdentity, and CardLog) is documented here as the domain variant. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#accordion · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/accordion`
- **Input** (`@/shared/components/ui/input`) — Single-line text field on the C2 dark surface — translucent input-background fill, layered focus ring, selection styled via tokens. The base of every search / form field. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#input · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/input`
- **Textarea** (`@/shared/components/ui/textarea`) — Multi-line text field sharing Input's surface grammar — translucent fill, focus ring, min-height with free vertical resize. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#textarea · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/textarea`
- **Select** (`@/shared/components/ui/select`) — Radix-based dropdown picker: trigger reads like an Input, the popover panel floats on the overlay surface with check-marked items and scroll cues. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#select · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/select`
- **Checkbox** (`@/shared/components/ui/checkbox`) — Radix checkbox with checked / unchecked / indeterminate states — accent fill when checked, layered ring when idle. Pair with a label for the hit target. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#checkbox · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/checkbox`
- **Switch** (`@/shared/components/ui/switch`) — Radix on/off switch — a sliding thumb on a tinted track, accent fill when checked. For immediate-effect settings (arm, mute, auto-track), not form submission. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#switch · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/switch`
- **Slider** (`@/shared/components/ui/slider`) — Radix range slider — tinted track, accent range fill, and a grabbable thumb with a focus ring. Single- or multi-thumb; used for zoom, volume, and threshold controls. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#slider · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/slider`
- **Tabs** (`@/shared/components/ui/tabs`) — Radix tabs — a muted list rail with an active-surface trigger and swappable panels. Arrow keys move between triggers; content mounts per tab. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#tabs · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/tabs`
- **Dialog** (`@/shared/components/ui/dialog`) — Radix modal dialog — dimmed backdrop, centered overlay-surface panel with the overlay motion, focus trapped inside until dismissed. For confirmations and focused edit tasks. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#dialog · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/dialog`
- **Popover** (`@/shared/components/ui/popover`) — Radix anchored popover — a floating overlay-surface panel positioned against its trigger, dismissed by outside click or Esc. Non-modal: the app stays interactive behind it. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#popover · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/popover`
- **DropdownMenu** (`@/shared/components/ui/dropdown-menu`) — Radix action menu anchored to a trigger — items, checkbox/radio items, separators, and submenus on the overlay surface. Powers overflow (⋯) and split-button menus. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#dropdown-menu · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/dropdown-menu`
- **Tooltip** (`@/shared/components/ui/tooltip`) — Radix hover/focus tooltip — a small inverted-surface label with an arrow, delayed in and instant between siblings. Requires the app-level TooltipProvider (already mounted). Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#tooltip · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/tooltip`
- **Toasts (sonner)** (`@/shared/components/ui/sonner`) — App-wide toast queue via sonner. The vendored Toaster wears the C2 surface (surface-3 fill, layered ring, 2px radius), follows the live text direction, and stacks top-center. Fire with toast() / toast.success() / toast.error(). Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#sonner · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/sonner`

### Blocks

- **TelemetryRow** (`@/primitives`) — Single telemetry metric: icon, label, monospace value. Laid out in a 3-column grid that wraps by item count. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#telemetry · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/telemetry-row`
- **CardHeader** (`@/primitives`) — Top row of a TargetCard — icon, title, subtitle, status chip, badge, and chevron. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-header · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-header`
- **CardActions** (`@/primitives`) — Action bar for a TargetCard. Composes Button presets (ActionButton, SplitActionButton), the Toggle-based CameraToggleButton, and the confirm pattern. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-actions · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-actions`
- **CardDetails** (`@/primitives`) — Collapsible telemetry accordion. Composes AccordionSection and TelemetryRow in a fixed grid. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-details · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-details`
- **CardSensors** (`@/primitives`) — Lists detecting sensors for a target with type, distance, and timestamp. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-sensors · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-sensors`
- **CardMedia** (`@/primitives`) — Image or video slot for a target surveillance feed. Supports live badge, playback, and lightbox. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-media · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-media`
- **CardLog** (`@/primitives`) — Chronological event log accordion with newest-first ordering and expand-all. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-log · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-log`
- **CardClosure** (`@/primitives`) — Outcome selection grid for closing a detection event. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-closure · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-closure`
- **CardIdentity** (`@/primitives`) — Identity rows (name, model, serial) in a collapsible 2-col grid matching CardDetails, with a per-row hover-revealed CopyButton riding a gradient fade so long IDs dissolve cleanly under the icon. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-identity
- **CardTimeline** (`@/primitives`) — Engagement progress steps — pending / active / complete / error — as a vertical checklist or a compact dot strip for collapsed headers. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-timeline · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-timeline`
- **CardFooterDock** (`@/primitives`) — Recessed action dock pinned to a TargetCard's bottom edge — equal-width quiet buttons on an inset-shadow strip, for secondary whole-card actions. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#card-footer-dock · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/card-footer-dock`
- **TargetCard** (`@/primitives`) — The core card shell. Composes CardHeader with slot children via the useCardSlots hook. The single most important block in the system. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#target-card · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/target-card`
- **FilterBar** (`@/primitives`) — Search input plus data-driven filter dropdowns. Pass any number of filter dimensions as a FilterDef[]. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#filter-bar · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/filter-bar`
- **Device Card** (`@/shared/components/DevicesPanel`) — One collapsible row per field asset, registry-driven. Health tile, primary cluster, footer actions, and overflow. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#device-card
- **DevicesPanel** (`@/shared/components/DevicesPanel`) — Right-hand sidebar listing connected field devices grouped by type, with search and type-filter isolation. Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#devices-panel
- **MapMarker** (`@/primitives`) — Composable tactical marker: layered surface, ring, glyph, glow, and overlays, driven by resolveMarkerStyle(). Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#map-markers · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/map-marker`
- **MapIcons** (`@/primitives`) — First-party tactical glyphs — drone, missile, car, tank, truck, human, unknown, jam wave. Each ships in two forms: the map variant (color prop + black legibility stroke for imagery) and the *CardIcon variant (stroke-free, rides currentColor for in-UI tiles). Docs: https://c2-hub-three.vercel.app/design-system#map-icons · install: `npx shadcn@latest add @c2/map-icons`

## Design tokens (generated from tokens/*.json)

Use the CSS var or the `@/primitives` export — never the raw value.

- `--c2-primitive-color-white` = `#ffffff` (core/primitive) — Pure white. Base for translucent surface overlays.
- `--c2-primitive-color-black` = `#000000` (core/primitive) — Pure black. Base for the selection ring tint.
- `--c2-primitive-color-surface-0` = `#0d0e11` (core/primitive) — Base (= --surface-1) — page background and card content area.
- `--c2-primitive-color-surface-1` = `#15171a` (core/primitive) — Raised (= --surface-2) — card container and sidebar.
- `--c2-primitive-color-surface-2` = `#1e2124` (core/primitive) — Overlay (= --surface-3) — borders and dividers, card container fill.
- `--c2-primitive-color-surface-3` = `#282c30` (core/primitive) — Inset (= --surface-4) — icon boxes and closure buttons.
- `--c2-primitive-color-surface-4` = `#353a40` (core/primitive) — Hover (= --surface-5) — sensor rows and hover states.
- `--c2-primitive-color-neutral-200` = `#ced5de` (core/primitive) — High-contrast text (= --slate-11) — titles, primary values.
- `--c2-primitive-color-neutral-500` = `#8d949f` (core/primitive) — Low-contrast text (= --slate-9) — subtitles, captions, metadata.
- `--c2-primitive-color-red-base` = `oklch(0.395 0.110 27)` (core/primitive) — Resting destructive fill (= --accent-danger-soft).
- `--c2-primitive-color-red-hover` = `oklch(0.445 0.110 27)` (core/primitive) — Destructive hover — one lightness step up.
- `--c2-primitive-color-red-active` = `oklch(0.345 0.110 27)` (core/primitive) — Destructive pressed — one lightness step down.
- `--c2-primitive-color-amber-base` = `oklch(0.420 0.090 70)` (core/primitive) — Resting warning fill (= --accent-warning-soft).
- `--c2-primitive-color-amber-hover` = `oklch(0.470 0.090 70)` (core/primitive) — Warning hover — one lightness step up.
- `--c2-primitive-color-amber-active` = `oklch(0.370 0.090 70)` (core/primitive) — Warning pressed — one lightness step down.
- `--c2-color-surface-base` = `#0d0e11` (core/semantic) — Lowest surface — page and card-content background.
- `--c2-color-surface-raised` = `#15171a` (core/semantic) — Raised surface — cards, sidebar, code panels.
- `--c2-color-surface-overlay` = `#1e2124` (core/semantic) — Container fill, borders, dividers.
- `--c2-color-surface-inset` = `#282c30` (core/semantic) — Recessed wells — icon boxes, closure buttons.
- `--c2-color-surface-hover` = `#353a40` (core/semantic) — Hover/active row surface.
- `--c2-color-text-default` = `#ced5de` (core/semantic) — Default high-contrast text.
- `--c2-color-text-muted` = `#8d949f` (core/semantic) — Secondary, lower-emphasis text.
- `--c2-color-action-danger-bg` = `oklch(0.395 0.110 27)` (core/semantic) — Destructive action background.
- `--c2-color-action-danger-hover` = `oklch(0.445 0.110 27)` (core/semantic) — Destructive action hover.
- `--c2-color-action-danger-active` = `oklch(0.345 0.110 27)` (core/semantic) — Destructive action pressed.
- `--c2-color-action-warning-bg` = `oklch(0.420 0.090 70)` (core/semantic) — Warning action background.
- `--c2-color-action-warning-hover` = `oklch(0.470 0.090 70)` (core/semantic) — Warning action hover.
- `--c2-color-action-warning-active` = `oklch(0.370 0.090 70)` (core/semantic) — Warning action pressed.
- `--c2-color-focus-ring` = `#ffffff` (core/semantic) — Focus-visible ring color (applied at reduced opacity by components).
- `--c2-color-selection-ring` = `#000000` (core/semantic) — Selected-card ring tint (applied at 15% opacity).
- `--c2-radius-interactive` = `4px` (core/semantic) — Border radius for all interactive elements — buttons, badges, chips. The system's signature 4px corner.
- `--c2-threat-idle` = `#52525b` (domain/domain) — No activity — neutral grey.
- `--c2-threat-suspicion` = `#f59e0b` (domain/domain) — Suspected target — amber.
- `--c2-threat-detection` = `#fa5252` (domain/domain) — Active detection — red.
- `--c2-threat-tracking` = `#fd7e14` (domain/domain) — Being tracked — orange.
- `--c2-threat-mitigating` = `#ef4444` (domain/domain) — Jam in progress — bright red.
- `--c2-threat-active` = `#74c0fc` (domain/domain) — Mission active — blue.
- `--c2-threat-resolved` = `#12b886` (domain/domain) — Neutralized / resolved — green.
- `--c2-threat-expired` = `#3f3f46` (domain/domain) — Timed out — dark grey.

## Governance rules (generated from governance/rules.json)

- **no-raw-hex** [error] — Do not hardcode color literals (hex, oklch(), rgb()) in app or component code. Colors are authored once in src/styles/palette.css (and tokens/*.json) and consumed via tokens. Fix: Use a semantic token: a palette.css var (e.g. var(--surface-1), var(--accent-danger)), a tokenized Tailwind utility (bg-surface-*, text-slate-*, bg-state-*), or an @/primitives/accentHex export (ACCENT_HEX, SLATE_HEX, MARKER_HEX) where a literal string is required (Cesium, SVG, Canvas).
- **no-arbitrary-type-and-color-classes** [error] — Do not use arbitrary Tailwind font sizes (text-[Npx]) or hex colors (-[#hex]). The type scale and color ramps are declared in src/styles/tailwind.css. Fix: Type: text-3xs / text-2xs / text-xs-plus / text-xs / text-sm-minus / text-sm. Color: bg-surface-*, text-slate-*, bg-accent-*-soft, bg-state-*.
- **accenthex-generated** [error] — accentHex.ts is a generated mirror of palette.css's oklch tokens — never hand-edit a hex value there without changing the palette first. Fix: Change the oklch value in src/styles/palette.css, then update the mirrored hex (the CI check converts oklch to hex and fails on drift).
- **icons-central-only** [error] — Import glyphs from @/lib/icons/central, never from lucide-react or @central-icons-react/* directly. The central wrapper is the only module allowed to know which icon library ships. Fix: import { IconName } from '@/lib/icons/central'. If the glyph is missing, add it to the wrapper (prefer a filled Central glyph).
- **prefer-filled-icons** [warn] — Prefer the filled icon variant over the outlined/line variant whenever a filled twin exists. Fix: Use the *Filled export from @/lib/icons/central (e.g. BellFilled); add the filled export to central.ts if it is missing.
- **interactive-radius** [warn] — Interactive elements (buttons, badges, chips) use the 4px 'rounded' radius — the system's signature corner. Fix: Apply rounded (4px) / var(--c2-radius-interactive); avoid ad-hoc rounded-md|lg|full on interactive controls.
- **rtl-containers** [warn] — User-facing containers are RTL. Use logical Tailwind utilities (ms-*, me-*, ps-*, pe-*, start-*, end-*) for spacing; reserve rtl:/ltr: for physical outcomes like icon mirroring. Fix: Set dir="rtl" on user-facing roots and replace left/right utilities with their logical equivalents.
- **oklch-status-colors** [info] — Danger and warning action colors are authored in oklch so hover/active stay perceptually even. Fix: Author destructive/warning ramps as oklch in tokens/core.json (action.danger / action.warning).
- **card-slots-via-hook** [warn] — Build TargetCard content with the useCardSlots hook from a Detection object; never hardcode card slot data. Fix: const slots = useCardSlots(detection, callbacks, context); pass slots into TargetCard.
- **tokens-single-source** [info] — Colors and the interactive radius are defined only in tokens/*.json (generated into tokens.generated.ts + tokens.generated.css). Do not introduce new color scales elsewhere. Fix: Add the value to tokens/core.json (or tokens/c2-domain.json for tactical accents) and run `pnpm tokens:build`.

<!-- GENERATED:components END -->
